narrative:
Big Spring Twp township has 1,112 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
